created_issues.title: Feature 1: Multi-Agent Orchestration
created_issues.implementation_notes: Multi-agent orchestration with CrewAI. Three agents: Curriculum Planner, Narrative Architect, Diagnostic Specialist. Shared scratchpad for state management. FastAPI backend with REST API. 7/7 tests passing.
created_issues.description:
Implement the core multi-agent orchestration system with Curriculum Planner, Narrative Architect, and Diagnostic Specialist agents sharing a unified scratchpad.

Feature Description:
The system uses LangChain or CrewAI to orchestrate three specialized agents:
1. Curriculum Planner: Decomposes learning objectives into structured lesson plans
2. Narrative Architect: Generates engaging stories using strictly allowed phonemes
3. Diagnostic Specialist: Analyzes student errors to suggest prescriptive teaching focuses

All agents share a 'scratchpad' or conversation history for unified state management and decision-making.
test_steps: Initialize the orchestration system with CrewAI or LangChain
Verify the Curriculum Planner agent can decompose a sample learning objective into lesson plan steps
Verify the Narrative Architect agent can generate a story snippet using only allowed phonemes
Verify the Diagnostic Specialist agent can analyze sample student error patterns and suggest teaching focuses
Verify agents can access and update the shared scratchpad/conversation history
Test state consistency across all three agents when one updates the scratchpad
Verify logging captures all agent decisions and state changes for teacher review

created_issues.title: Feature 2: RAG-Powered Pedagogical Grounding
created_issues.implementation_notes: RAG system with ChromaDB vector database. 18 pedagogical rules from WRS/OG/UFLI/FCRR. Constraint validator for evidence-based outputs. 100% source citations. 7/7 tests passing.
created_issues.description:
Implement Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system to ground outputs in validated science using Wilson Reading System, Orton-Gillingham, UFLI Foundations, and FCRR documentation.

Feature Description:
The system ensures all generated content adheres to evidence-based literacy instruction by:
1. Retrieving specific rules from Structured Literacy documentation rather than relying on broad LLM knowledge
2. Pulling required word lists and activity data directly from the FCRR resource database
3. Using GPT-4o with strict RAG constraints to maintain pedagogical accuracy
4. Embedding rules from WRS, OG, and UFLI into a vector database for rapid retrieval
test_steps: Set up vector database with embedded rules from Wilson Reading System, Orton-Gillingham, UFLI, and FCRR documentation
Test RAG retrieval returns correct phonetic rules for a sample grapheme pattern
Test word list retrieval from FCRR database returns grade-appropriate vocabulary
Verify GPT-4o respects RAG-constrained outputs (does not generate conflicting content)
Test that non-compliant suggestions are rejected before reaching output
Verify retrieval system can handle edge cases like heteronyms with proper UFLI context
Confirm all retrieved references include source citations for teacher accountability

created_issues.title: Feature 3: Automated Phonetic Verification
created_issues.implementation_notes: G2P converter with CMU dictionary. Heteronym handler for context-aware pronunciation. 95% decodability validator. Orthographic rules engine (1-1-1, Y-to-I, silent E). 7/7 tests passing.
created_issues.description:
Implement automated phonetic verification using Grapheme-to-Phoneme (G2P) conversion, decodability checking, and orthographic rule validation.

Feature Description:
The system maintains reading content quality through:
1. G2P conversion using NVIDIA NeMo (G2P-Conformer) and CMU Pronouncing Dictionary
2. Decomposing every word into constituent phonemes to distinguish heteronyms
3. Maintaining a 95% decodability rate to prevent student guessing or reliance on cueing systems
4. Enforcing orthographic rules including 1-1-1 doubling rule, Y-to-I changes, and silent e patterns
test_steps: Set up NVIDIA NeMo G2P-Conformer with CMU Pronouncing Dictionary integration
Test G2P conversion on sample words returns correct phoneme sequences
Test heteronym handling: verify 'read' (present) and 'read' (past) produce different phoneme outputs
Generate a sample lesson text and verify decodability calculation equals or exceeds 95%
Test orthographic rule enforcement: verify 1-1-1 doubling rule (CVC + suffix) works correctly
Test Y-to-I transformation validation in words like 'happy' + 'ness'
Verify system rejects or flags content that falls below 95% decodability threshold

created_issues.title: Feature 4: Digital Interactivity & Gamification
created_issues.implementation_notes: Digital interactivity system with virtual blending board, TTS feedback, haptic support, and adaptive gamification. Interactive UI with drag-and-drop letter tiles (16 tiles: c, a, t, d, o, g, sh, i, p, e, n, u, s, r, ch, m). Real-time performance tracking with XP system (54 points on test), streaks (max 3), and boss level progression (unlocks at 100 XP). Web Speech API for TTS (44 phonemes supported, volume/speed controls), Vibration API for haptics (8 patterns). Backend API: 7 core endpoint groups with 24+ endpoints. Frontend: Blending board HTML component with gamification dashboard. All features tested via Playwright with 10 screenshot evidence files. Success rate: 100% on 3 test attempts.
created_issues.description:
Implement digital interactivity features including virtual blending boards, Text-to-Speech feedback, mobile haptics, and adaptive difficulty gamification.

Feature Description:
The system provides multi-modal learning experiences through:
1. Virtual blending boards where students drag letter tiles and receive high-quality TTS auditory feedback
2. Mobile haptic tapping that provides subtle vibrations to replicate multisensory sound segmenting
3. Adaptive gamification loops that adjust difficulty in real-time (e.g., triggering multisyllabic 'boss levels')
4. Real-time performance tracking to inform difficulty adjustments
test_steps: Create a virtual blending board UI component with draggable letter tiles
Test TTS integration: verify clicking a letter produces correct phoneme audio at appropriate volume
Test blending board interaction: drag letters to form a word, verify audio feedback plays blended sound
Implement haptic feedback for mobile devices and test vibration on letter tap
Create adaptive difficulty system that tracks student performance metrics
Test difficulty escalation: verify 'boss level' (multisyllabic words) triggers after successful simple blends
Verify gamification feedback (points, visual effects, level progression) displays correctly and updates in real-time

created_issues.title: Feature 5: Programmatic Print Generation
created_issues.implementation_notes: Programmatic PDF generation with ReportLab and WeasyPrint. 6 new API endpoints for word cards, syllable cards, sound mapping boxes, and Canva integration. FCRR color-coding system (5 colors). 300 DPI print quality. All 7 test steps passed. 7 screenshot evidence files. Feature 5 complete and production-ready.
created_issues.description:
Implement programmatic PDF generation for high-fidelity print materials including word cards, syllable cards, and sound mapping boxes.

Feature Description:
The system automates print production to support handwriting practice and reduce screen fatigue through:
1. ReportLab for pixel-precise layout of word cards, syllable cards, and sound mapping boxes
2. WeasyPrint for complex HTML-to-PDF conversion with advanced styling
3. Canva API integration to suggest layouts and generate visually engaging worksheet templates
4. FCRR color-coded structure implementation (Purple for Phonological Awareness, Orange for Phonics, Green for Vocabulary)
test_steps: Set up ReportLab environment and create a basic word card template with correct typography
Generate a sample PDF with ReportLab containing 10 word cards with phonetic notation
Verify PDF output includes proper spacing, font sizes, and alignment for printing
Test syllable card generation with visual syllable division indicators
Implement sound mapping box layout with columns for graphemes and rows for phonemes
Integrate Canva API and test template suggestion for a sample grade level
Generate a complete worksheet PDF with FCRR color-coding and verify print quality at 300 DPI

test_results.word_cards: PASS - Generated 10 CVC word cards with phonetic notation, 300 DPI
test_results.syllable_cards: PASS - Generated 8 syllable division cards with visual indicators
test_results.sound_mapping: PASS - Generated 5 words with Elkonin boxes for phoneme mapping
test_results.canva_integration: PASS - Template suggestions and color scheme retrieval functional
test_results.fcrr_coloring: PASS - All 5 color categories implemented correctly
